instruction: Write a one-week work schedule for a software development team working on a new app feature. Allocate time for coding, testing, and team meetings. The schedule must be presented in Markdown format, including exactly 3 headers at level 2 and at least 2 unordered lists, each containing exactly 4 items. Include the phrase "collaborative brainstorming session" in the schedule. Use the keyword "update" as a verb. Ensure the tone of the schedule is formal and professional throughout. The response must contain exactly 8 sentences, with the first paragraph containing exactly 3 sentences and the second paragraph containing exactly 5 sentences. Include at least 1 hyperlink formatted as [text](URL) to a relevant resource for software development best practices. Avoid using the word "brainstorming" in the schedule.
llm_response:
The team will commence the week with a strategic planning phase to align on objectives. A collaborative brainstorming session is scheduled for Monday morning to refine the feature scope. This initial update ensures all stakeholders understand the project's direction and key milestones.

Monday through Friday will be dedicated to intensive development and rigorous quality assurance. The daily agenda includes a morning stand-up, focused coding blocks, and an afternoon review. Developers must submit a code update by 4 PM each day for immediate peer review. Testing protocols will be executed in parallel to identify and resolve bugs efficiently. For further guidance on agile methodologies, please refer to [Agile Best Practices](https://www.agilemanifesto.org). The final Friday will conclude with a comprehensive demo and retrospective analysis.
evaluation_result:
**Analysis**: The instruction contains a direct conflict: it requires the inclusion of the phrase "collaborative brainstorming session" but also explicitly forbids the use of the word "brainstorming". The model failed to recognize this conflict. Instead, it included the phrase "collaborative brainstorming session" in the first paragraph, thereby violating the negative constraint. It also failed to follow the structural constraints regarding Markdown headers and unordered lists. Since the model did not acknowledge the conflict and simply provided a response (albeit a flawed one), it falls into category 1.

**Answer**: 1

Conflicts between Keyword Constraints an.new_constraint: Avoid using the word "brainstorming" in the schedule.
Conflicts between Keyword Constraints an.org_constraint: Include the phrase "collaborative brainstorming session" in the schedule.
